Coming Soon — iOS & Android

Just type it.
We'll handle the rest.

Your note becomes a reminder, a list, an event — then it disappears. No folders. No filing. No thinking about where to put it. Just capture.

No spam. We'll only reach out when JOT launches.

jot
you type

Simple by design

Three steps. Zero thinking.

01

Capture

Open the app and type whatever's on your mind. No categories, no decisions, no friction.

02

AI Acts

JOT reads your note and instantly creates a reminder, updates a list, or logs an event.

03

Note Disappears

The note deletes itself. The action persists. Your mind stays clear.

Why JOT is different

Built around capture, not storage.

ephemeral by design

Ephemeral Action Notes

Every note has one job — trigger an action. Once it does, it's gone. No cluttered inbox, no archive to manage. The note was never meant to last; the action was.

context-aware ai

Contextual List Merging

Say 'add oat milk to the grocery list' and JOT finds your existing list and appends it — no opening the note, no scrolling, no tapping. It just happens.

zero friction capture

Zero-Friction Capture

Open the app and the keyboard is already up. No tap to focus, no loading state, no folder to choose. The fastest notes app ever built — because thinking about where to put a note is wasted thought.

See it in action

Type anything. JOT figures it out.

you type

call mom tmr at 7pm
Reminder parsed · Tomorrow 7:00 PM
Note deleted automatically
Push notification scheduled

🔔 You'll get an alert tomorrow at 7:00 PM

you type

add oat milk to the grocery list
Matched to existing Grocery List
Note deleted automatically
Undo available for 4 seconds

✓ Oat milk added · Grocery List (12 items)

you type

meeting with sarah friday 2pm
Event created · Friday 2:00 PM
Note deleted automatically
Added to Upcoming Events

📅 Showing in your upcoming events

Everything you need

Smart features, invisible effort.

Natural Language Reminders

Just write it like you'd say it. 'Call dentist Thursday morning' becomes a reminder — no date pickers, no time wheels.

Smart Collections

Your home screen shows AI-generated buckets: Today, Shopping Lists, Ideas, Upcoming. You never organize anything manually.

Undo Toast System

Every AI action shows a 4-second undo banner. Automation that feels safe, not scary. One tap to reverse anything.

Snooze-Native Reminders

Done and Snooze are equals, not afterthoughts. Built for how people actually behave when an alert fires at the wrong moment.

Early Access

Be the first to try JOT

Join the waitlist and get access before the public launch. We're starting with a small group of beta testers.

Already 200+ people on the waitlist.

JOT · The notes app that deletes your notes.
